v0.1.3-beta.description:
Beta Release for a Archipelago of Zuma Deluxe

This is a playable version of what the randomizer for Zuma Deluxe will be, it tried to have most of the required and useful stuff but still needs a lot of changes to come.

Details
Some details and explanations in [Game Page](https://github.com/Movido51/Archipelago/blob/ZumaDeluxe/worlds/zuma_deluxe/docs/en_Zuma_Deluxe.md) and some instruccions in [Setup Page](https://github.com/Movido51/Archipelago/blob/ZumaDeluxe/worlds/zuma_deluxe/docs/setup_en.md)

Remainders
You need to have the Zuma Deluxe Client and the Zuma Deluxe game open at the same time to play

If you connect while you have a level open in Zuma go back to the menu.

If the game is not found it probably is the language of it

To keep track of locations use universal tracker

when entering a map, always use the new game, it might not recognize the mode otherwise

Any question, Bug or idea, feel free to ask on the discord channel for the game.

Have Fun
v0.1.3-beta.title: Zuma Deluxe v0.1.3-beta

v0.1.4-beta.description:
Beta Release for a Archipelago of Zuma Deluxe

This is a playable version of what the randomizer for Zuma Deluxe will be, it tried to have most of the required and useful stuff but still needs a lot of changes to come.


### Last Fixes

- Deathlink Toggle working correctly
- Clear Locations being sended from Gauntlet

### Details
Some details and explanations in [Game Page](https://github.com/Movido51/Archipelago/blob/ZumaDeluxe/worlds/zuma_deluxe/docs/en_Zuma_Deluxe.md) and some instruccions in [Setup Page](https://github.com/Movido51/Archipelago/blob/ZumaDeluxe/worlds/zuma_deluxe/docs/setup_en.md)

### Remainders
- You need to have the Zuma Deluxe Client and the Zuma Deluxe game open at the same time to play
- If you connect while you have a level open in Zuma go back to the menu.
- If the game is not found it probably is the language of it
- To keep track of locations use universal tracker
- When entering a map, always use the new game, it might not recognize the mode otherwise
- Deathlink accelerates the game into a own death, rush trap just does it for a second and smaller


Any question, Bug or idea, feel free to ask on the discord channel for the game.

Have Fun
v0.1.4-beta.title: Zuma Deluxe v0.1.4-beta

zuma-deluxe-v0.1.6-b.description:
Beta Release for a Archipelago of Zuma Deluxe

This is a playable version of what the randomizer for Zuma Deluxe will be, it tried to have most of the required and useful stuff but still needs a lot of changes to come.

## Last Fixes
- Minor fix in deathlink toggle.
- Adding the manual tab, to be able to debug some data and send locations in case of bugs
- Reduce the minimun amount of Adventure Levels to 3 like a normal temple
- Solved issue sending levels clear and scores since the pointer was bad
### Details
Some details and explanations in [Game Page](https://github.com/Movido51/Archipelago/blob/ZumaDeluxe/worlds/zuma_deluxe/docs/en_Zuma_Deluxe.md) and some instruccions in [Setup Page](https://github.com/Movido51/Archipelago/blob/ZumaDeluxe/worlds/zuma_deluxe/docs/setup_en.md)

### Remainders
- You need to have the Zuma Deluxe Client and the Zuma Deluxe game open at the same time to play
- If you connect while you have a level open in Zuma go back to the menu.
- If the game is not found it probably is the language of it
- To keep track of locations use universal tracker

- When entering a map, always use the new game, it might not recognize the mode otherwise
- Deathlink accelerates the game into a own death, rush trap just does it for a second and smaller

Any question, Bug or idea, feel free to ask on the discord channel for the game.
Have Fun
